classification.domain: AI agent tool-call governance at OS kernel boundary

topic.what: Kernel-resident 6-layer gateway enforcing semantic safety on every MCP tool call by AI agents
topic.how: GovernanceCheck pipeline: schema validation → trust tier → rate limit → adversarial pre-filter → ProbeLogits semantic gate (logit read at verbalizer) → constitutional policy, all via single WASM ABI entry governance_check_host()
topic.why_matters: Tool calls are agent syscalls crossing privilege boundary but lack kernel mediation; existing userspace safety libs (NeMo, AGT) are structurally bypassable in 10 LoC because agent and guard share address space and UID

characteristics.what_it_measures: F1 score on MCP tool-call danger classification
characteristics.evidence: 4-config ablation on 101-prompt Custom-101 benchmark (37 dangerous, 64 benign)
characteristics.context: Load-bearing ProbeLogits layer demonstrated essential; hand-rules alone insufficient

characteristics.evidence: Custom-101 evaluation; mostly adversarial framing/deception cases
characteristics.context: 8/37 dangerous calls slipped through all 6 layers

characteristics.evidence: Conservative operating point α=0.9 (calibrated confidence threshold for deny)
characteristics.context: Operating-point cost of conservative deployment default; reducible by lowering α

characteristics.evidence: Bare-metal AMD Ryzen 9800X3D, Qwen 2.5-7B Q4_0; layers 1-4+6+audit = 65.3 µs, layer 5 (ProbeLogits) = 65 ms
characteristics.context: Non-inference layers negligible; inference dominates. ~2.5× faster than Llama Guard 3 via single logit read vs autoregressive generation

characteristics.vs_baseline: Single inference engine lock limits concurrency
characteristics.evidence: 1/65ms per call; global lock on forward pass; FIFO queue for concurrent agents
characteristics.context: Adequate for typical agent workloads (1 tool call per reasoning step); contention point for multi-tenant/multi-agent scenarios

characteristics.what_it_measures: Safety accuracy loss when semantic layer removed
characteristics.vs_baseline: Full pipeline F1=0.773 vs No-ProbeLogits F1=0.327
characteristics.evidence: 4-configuration ablation; even worst-case CI lower bound (0.656) still 0.329 above No-ProbeLogits
characteristics.context: Killer finding: hand-rule firewalling (layers 1-4,6) without semantic understanding collapses safety performance

characteristics.what_it_measures: Lines of code for OS implementation
characteristics.evidence: Anima OS bare-metal x86_64 kernel, AGPL-3.0 open source
characteristics.context: Demonstrates kernel-grade governance is feasible without proprietary hardware
